title: UUID generation function missing in PostgreSQL
symptom: When starting the n8n-import container, an error occurs stating 'function uuid_generate_v4() does not exist'. This prevents the database migrations from completing successfully.
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n now only reads from the public schema in PostgreSQL, and the uuid_generate_v4() function is not available in that schema. This can happen if the extension is installed in a different schema or not properly referenced.
fix_steps: Run the SQL command: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.uuid_generate_v4() RETURNS uuid LANGUAGE sql AS $$ SELECT extensions.uuid_generate_v4(); $$;
agent_instruction: Create the uuid_generate_v4 function in the public schema of your PostgreSQL database.
